info.name: Currency Quetzal
info.description: Guatemalan Quetzal (GTQ) exchange rates relative to USD (base currency)

buyRate.description: Exchange rate to buy GTQ with USD. Example: 7.6741 means 1 USD = 7.6741 GTQ

sellRate.description: Exchange rate to sell GTQ for USD. Example: 7.67 means 1 USD = 7.67 GTQ
